---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, incomplete or outdated documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Page Or File

Link to the README or documentation file.

## What Is Unclear Or Incorrect?

Describe the documentation problem.

## Suggested Change

If useful, suggest wording or an example that would make it clearer.

Do not include real participant data, credentials, TRE outputs or other sensitive
information.
